summary: Community feedback shows strong passive approval (12 simple approvals) but highlights significant issues with the photorealistic interpretation of complex garment structures in lifestyle mockups. There is a clear demand for diversification in garment cuts, specifically for male silhouettes, and refinement of existing trim aesthetics.

lifestyle_image_improvements.issue: Legs improperly interacting with integrated shorts/outerwear (Product 69a8573017b1fdfce805de06).
lifestyle_image_improvements.action: Implement stricter rendering checks for layered lower-body garments to ensure anatomical coherence. Add prompt modifier: 'anatomically plausible lower body integration'.

lifestyle_image_improvements.issue: Ambiguity in garment type presentation (e.g., leggings presented as shorts/pants) (Product 69a86614291e3fbf690b3ed6).
lifestyle_image_improvements.action: Ensure lifestyle generation accurately depicts the intended fit/style based on blueprint metadata. Prompt for clarity: 'clearly depicted fit, labeling leggings as such if applicable'.

lifestyle_image_improvements.issue: Unusual appendage presentation (hands exiting unexpected openings, Product 69a788e8e2353ca9ec0a883d).
lifestyle_image_improvements.action: Review template structures for integrated sleeves/aprons to prevent unnatural limb egress points in rendering.

garment_priorities.reason: Direct request for male version of an existing template/concept.
Confusion over intended use/fit suggests this template needs clarification or dedicated lifestyle renders.

aesthetic_adjustments.details: Override default white trim settings for upcoming batch generations where black trim was explicitly requested as superior.
Investigate the specific rendering engine/model interaction when applying pattern 69a5c8d659b4db7d4108d3c2 to new mockups. Ensure pattern mapping logic is consistent across templates.

popular_products.recommendation: Generate alternate lifestyle views focusing on the high-engagement area.
Generate alternate lifestyle views focusing on the high-engagement area.
Verify pattern rendering accuracy for this specific design across all future pipelines.
